title: STRONGTHIUM 212cc GX160 Ignition Coil Assemlby for Predator 212 224cc Honda GX200 GX120 GX140 Coleman 196cc 5.5 6.5 hp
features: The aftermarket ignition coil fits for Honda GX 120 160 200 30500-ZE1-033 30500-ZE1-063 30500-ZE1-073 30500-ZE1-013 30500-ZE1-053 30500-ZE1-043; for Coleman CT200u ex BT200x Kt196 RT200 Baja Warrior Heat Massimo Tillotson Mb165 Mb200 160cc 196cc 200cc 5.5hp 6.5HP Mini Bike Go Kart
Compatible with Harbor Freight Predator 212cc 224cc Ghost 6.5hp Go Kart OHV Engine
Compatible with China 168 168f 170 170f 68mm 70mm bore engine Lifan Kipor Zongshen Loncin Ducar Rato. For many 196 212 224 cc gas power pressure washers.
For Honda WP30X em3000x eb3000x 3000 watt, for Predator 4000 4375 Champion 3500 4000 4500 Generac GP 3250 3300 3600 and Firman Pulsar Duromax ETQ Wen Westinghouse generators.
Mounting Hole Distance (From Center To Center): 2-1/4-inch. Package includs 1ps coil assy with 1pcs spark plug.
